name: Unknown AWS account with trusted access to IAM role
description: An IAM role's trust policy allows assumption by an AWS account that is not part of the known organization, potentially enabling unauthorized cross-account access
conditions: assume_role_policy_document CONTAINS ':root' AND assume_role_policy_document NOT CONTAINS 'aws:PrincipalOrgID'
remediation: 1. Review the trust policy and verify the trusted account is legitimate. 2. Add aws:PrincipalOrgID condition to restrict to organization accounts. 3. Use external ID for third-party access. 4. Remove untrusted principals.
